caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" speaks into a professional black microphone in an indoor studio setting. The background features several framed pictures on the wall and a white mannequin wearing a white garment. To the man's side, clothing racks are visible. In the bottom corners of the scene, there are logos; one on the left appears as a circular emblem with "BONE" and another on the right in red text that reads "BONE". As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his gaze and expression, transitioning from a neutral look to a smile while speaking. His mouth opens and closes as he talks, and his head tilts slightly, reflecting a natural conversational flow within the studio environment.
